title: Hardys Coal Shovel - Small Hand Shovel with Detachable Wooden Handle for Fireplace Ash, Garden BBQ, Gardening - Durable Alloy Steel - Rust-Resistant - 44 x 22 x 4cm
features: 𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐂𝐎𝐀𝐋 𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐋 - This coal shovel is made with a blend of wood, alloy steel, and metal, ensuring its durability and practicality for long-lasting use. It's suitable for a variety of tasks including shovelling coal and ash from your fireplace or garden BBQ.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐒𝐌𝐀𝐋𝐋 𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐋 - Not just a coal shovel, this hand shovel can also be used as a garden scoop, a pet feed scoop, large dustpan, or a small shovel metal for your gardening needs. Its simple yet effective design makes it a versatile tool in every home.

𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐂𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐆𝐄𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐋 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐄 - The shovel handle is detachable via fixing screw, allowing you to fit shovel handles of your preferred length. This customizable feature makes it an ideal short handled shovel for those who prefer a more compact tool.

𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐓-𝐈𝐍𝐒𝐔𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐃 𝐀𝐒𝐇 𝐒𝐇𝐎𝐕𝐄𝐋 - The wooden handle of this ash shovel for wood burner insulates from heat, making it safe to use when scooping hot coal or ash. It's also a rust-resistant coal shovel heavy duty, ensuring its longevity even with frequent use.

𝐏𝐑𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐋 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐃𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍𝐒 - This coal shovel small measures 44 x 22 x 4cm, making it a convenient size for various uses. Its metal shovel design, along with a rust-resistant finish, makes it a practical tool as an ash pan shovel or garden shovel.
description: Product Description Why use Hardys Coal Shovel? A wide pan with flat leading edge, flared sides and heat treated alloy steel effectively scoops and transfers solid and powder materials in fireplaces, BBQ’s, stoves and coal storage areas. The treated wooden handle diffuses heat for safe transfer. Can I use Hardys Coal Shovel for more than coal? The ergonomic handle and curved pan easily accommodate a wide number of jobs. You can scoop coal or ash with ease, but it’s also ideal for clearing snow, debris, leaves and more both in the home and the garden. What if I’m looking for a longer handle? The natural wooden handle is securely held in place with a wide gauge screw. The already installed handle is designed to withstand rigorous use, but if you’re looking for something longer it can be switched out for a length of your choosing. Is Hardys Coal Shovel suitable for outdoor use? The steel alloy ash pan features black paint that’s suffused with rust resistant elements. You can confidently use this coal shovel inside or outside, and even store it in your outdoor coal shed or bunker. How durable is Hardys Coal Shovel? Purpose engineered to withstand extreme heat. The metal pan is treated for use in high-temperatures, while the wooden handle is treated for additional heat diffusion. Rust-resistant and durable, premium materials make this a long lasting tool.
